stemHtml: Which of the following situations could lead to the pilot of a light aircraft carrying out a precautionary landing?

options.a: Lack of situational awareness, total electrics failure, or fire in the cockpit.
options.b: Deteriorating weather, failure of primary flying controls, or total engine failure.
options.c: Tiredness, total engine failure, or a critically ill passenger.
options.d: Fuel shortage, deteriorating weather, or approaching darkness.
